full_text:
Li Feng 李封
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Feng (李封). Served Lü Bu. Killed by Xu Chu after neglecting his post in Yanzhou. Li Feng was affiliated with Lu Bu. Li Feng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
